The Chariot.effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Steel Card

Death.effect: Select 2 cards, convert the left card into the right card

The Devil.effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Gold Card

The Emperor.effect: Creates up to 2 random Tarot cards (Must have room)

The Empress.effect: Enhances 2 selected cards to Mult Cards

The Fool.effect: Creates the last Tarot or Planet card used during this run (The Fool excluded)

The Hierophant.effect: Enhances 2 selected cards to Bonus Cards

The High Priestess.effect: Creates up to 2 random Planet cards (Must have room)

Judgement.effect: Creates a random Joker card (Must have room)

Justice.effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Glass Card

The Lovers.effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Wild Card

The Magician.effect: Enhances 2 selected cards to Lucky Cards

The Moon.effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Clubs

The Star.effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Diamonds

Strength.effect: Increases rank of up to 2 selected cards by 1

The Sun.effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Hearts

Temperance.effect: Gives the total sell value of all current Jokers (Max of $50)

The Tower.effect: Enhances 1 selected card into a Stone Card

The Wheel of Fortune.effect: 1 in 4 chance to add Foil, Holographic, or Polychrome edition to a random Joker

The World.effect: Converts up to 3 selected cards to Spades
